# Zeno

Zeno is an open-source embodied intelligence platform for education, robotics competition, and research.

> This Organization profile is a proposed template. Replace this notice only after the Organization name, public repositories, contribution channels, and security contact have been approved.

## Explore

- Hardware, firmware, SDK, ROS 2, simulation, platforms, documentation, website, and examples are planned in the Organization repository map.
- Read the approved documentation and repository README before using hardware, software, or safety-sensitive features.

## Contribute

Please read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md) and [CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md](../CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md) before opening an Issue or Pull Request. Do not include credentials, private data, safety-sensitive incident details, or unpublished vulnerabilities in public Issues.

## Security and support

Use the approved private reporting channel described in [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md) for vulnerabilities. For normal usage questions, follow [SUPPORT.md](../SUPPORT.md). Public contact URLs are intentionally not included until approved.
